treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Successful creation of TIPS using a Viatorr stent (10 mm x 2 cm uncovered x 6 cm covered) and Luminexx stent (10 mm x 6 cm)
treatment_information.treatment_response: Uncomplicated procedure with hepatic portal gradient decrease from 18 to 3 mmHg; 9L of ascites removed

treatment_timeline.event: New medication Flomax started due to difficulty urinating post-TIPS

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Labs to be drawn on unspecified date; follow-up appointment with Dr. ___ pending
patient_outcome.complications: difficulty urinating, abdominal bloating and vomiting post-procedure
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient advised to call if experiencing concerning symptoms; safe to be discharged home
